## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, website updates, and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content publishing resumed with 24 pre-approved articles; focus shifting to Enterprise Flex content](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [New website launch successful; enables faster content scaling and implementation of SEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Google search result changes affecting SEO tool data; teams adapting to new baselines](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Key messaging for Airbyte 1.0: Flex, speed, and data activation to be emphasized in all content](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [24 pre-approved articles being published](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Drafts for Flex-related content expected by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Focus on Enterprise Flex content for next few months](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Emphasis on "hybrid deployment" keyword in all content](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [CTA framework updated to incorporate Flex messaging](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Website and Technical Updates

  - [New website launch enables faster content scaling](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Some tables broken during migration; manual fixes required](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [PSEO pages: engineering team working on pipeline and new Webflow template](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Looker Dashboard updated with new content categories](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)

### SEO Performance and Challenges

  - [Google changes affecting SEO tool data collection (limited to 20 results instead of 100)](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Overall trend of declining Google traffic observed across clients](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Opportunity to refresh and expand AI-related content (e.g., "How to train LLM on your own data")](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [GA4 data showing growth across content cohorts post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Security, privacy, and compliance topics performing well](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [HockeyStack preferred for more accurate web analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carrie to provide new Flex content drafts by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Tanmay to check with Nitin for a list of broken tables and share with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue fixing broken tables as they are identified](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Carrie to set up Airtable view access for Airbyte team](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Mario to provide list of allies and partners for mention in listicles](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Kyle to explore HockeyStack data for deeper performance insights](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Jacob to update on experimentation plans after returning from PTO](https://fathom.video/share/LRdFRJE1VW9gJPynFbtzihLdAUxW26do?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
